title: calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. champlainensis
intro: Calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. champlainensis, a subspecies of the short-bearded wheat grass, is a type of grass native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis breviligulata subsp. champlainensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
